summary: Trading System Review Testing (Iteration 58) - All 17 backend tests passed. Verified: (1) Replay with MES+MNQ has NO overlapping trades (max_concurrent_positions=1 enforced), (2) All trades have duration_minutes > 0 (no 0-second trades), (3) SignalStack orders returns both 'orders' (real SS) and 'v3_trades' (paper positions), (4) Fills/Journal returns positions with PnL, (5) Fills/Stats returns breakdown by regime and symbol.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/replay/run with MES+MNQ returns trades (2 trades generated)
✅ Replay metrics returned: 2 trades, 50% win rate
✅ NO OVERLAPPING TRADES: Trade 1 (MES) exits 01:05:52, Trade 2 (MNQ) enters 02:04:02 (~1h gap)
✅ All trades have duration > 0 (146.3 min and 57.8 min)
✅ V3 trades have correct structure: symbol, action, quantity, status, source, regime, etc.
✅ SignalStack symbol filter works: 7 orders, 8 v3_trades for MES
critical_code_review_comments: replay_engine.py (lines 926-928): max_concurrent_positions correctly enforced - new position only opened if len(active_positions) < max_concurrent
replay_engine.py (lines 914-923): Position updates only process snapshots for the SAME symbol - prevents cross-symbol interference
replay_engine.py (lines 620-624): duration_minutes correctly calculated from entry_time and exit_time
server.py (lines 7998-8043): GET /signalstack/orders correctly merges SS orders with V3 paper trades from positions collection
fills.py (lines 43-100): GET /fills/journal correctly enriches positions with orders and calculates realized_pnl
fills.py (lines 191-278): GET /fills/stats correctly aggregates by regime and symbol

test_credentials.note: Not required for tested endpoints (no auth needed)

seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing v3_snapshots collection (~2900 docs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trading system review complete. Key findings: (1) Replay engine correctly enforces max_concurrent_positions=1 - no overlapping trades across MES/MNQ. (2) Duration bug fixed - all trades have duration > 0. (3) SignalStack unified view working - returns both real SS orders and V3 paper trades. (4) Journal and Stats endpoints working with correct PnL calculation and regime/symbol breakdown. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_trading_system_review.py

feature_verification.POST /api/replay/run no overlap: VERIFIED - Trade 1 exits before Trade 2 enters (1h gap)

mocked_api_note: SignalStack webhook is MOCKED (returns mock 201). All other data is REAL from MongoDB.

replay_trade_details.overlap_check: NO OVERLAP - Trade 2 entry (02:04:02) is after Trade 1 exit (01:05:52)
